compounds.frequency: daily until desired tan, then maintenance

benefits.description: achieves desired tan with 1-2 tanning sessions per week combined with daily injections

protocol_notes: 15 years experience. Recommends 2-3 weeks for realistic tanning results, not 4 days. Suggests 1-2 tanning sessions weekly with daily 0.5mg injections until desired tan reached, then maintenance dose with minimum 1 tanning session per week.
